name: Tool / Integration Governance
owns: Tool registry, auth lifecycle, rate limits, resource locks, versioning
must_never: Expose raw credentials to any agent, model, or log payload
Skip contract validation even for internal tools
Let audit events contain credential values
notes: 8 corrections from Brian applied: two-layer schemas, expanded auth model, explicit governed/blocking, execution-context credentials, lock ownership metadata, rate limit windows, phase-specific audit events, risk mismatch behavior.
